$description: Captured 1:1 from components/ui/toggle-group/toggle-group.tsx. Items inherit every dimension from toggle.* — only the group shell has its own tokens. spacing=0 makes the items a joined segmented control (item radius collapses to the group's outer corners).

gap.$description: Default `spacing` prop = 2 → gap-[--spacing(2)] = 8px. spacing={0} joins the items.

radiusSm.$description: Size sm clamps: rounded-[min(var(--radius-md),10px)] → 8px at the kit default.

joinedPaddingX.$description: spacing=0 items tighten from px-2.5 to px-2.
